title: pelargonium × laxulum
intro: Pelargonium × laxulum, also known as Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The essential oils extracted from the leaves of Pelargonium × laxulum have been found to possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, providing several health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of digestive issues. Herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and essential oil extracts, are commonly used to harness the medicinal properties of Pelargonium × laxulum for therapeutic purposes.
